template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Top-down silhouette of a 75% board with a full keycap set in CYL profile (rounded-rect caps with inset top surface). Six well-distributed caps take the coral splash as the GREG colorway accents: backtick, E, G, LAlt, Up arrow, Down arrow — picking out a representative base/accent set spread across modifiers, alphas, and the navigation cluster. Warm-bronze hairlines on the top and bottom case edges only.
brief_summary: Hero art for the news-pillar companion piece to the GMK CYL GREG 2 group-buy listing: a top-down 75% board reads as the canvas, with six coral-splash caps distributed across the layout to suggest the GREG accent colorway sitting on a mostly warm-grey base set.

bronze_accent.name: warm-bronze
bronze_accent.usage: 1.5px hairlines on the top and bottom case edges only, 0.65 stroke opacity

tokens_snapshot: design/tokens.css — --kh-accent oklch(0.80 0.135 75); coral splash from canonical hero-art coral family
layout_choice: 75% — a single committed layout. 1020×410 case rectangle, six rows (F-row, number, top alpha, home, bottom alpha, modifier+spacebar), single right-side nav column tell.
style_guide: bearings.md § Article hero art (locked 2026-05-09): 2px warm-grey stroke throughout; single splash (coral) on accent caps; warm-bronze accent on case edges only; no multi-color, no blues or greens; transparent canvas.
